brief.speaker: oldrich
brief.text: How many different mouths have I served this year? Not how many cups — how many people. I am not a charity.

hints.text: Oldrich: 'You're counting cups, not faces. Use DISTINCT.'
Oldrich: 'You wrote it wrong. The shape is COUNT — open paren — DISTINCT — column — close paren.'
Oldrich: 'Count distinct patrons. Just one number.'

success.speaker: oldrich
success.text: Oldrich nods slowly. 'More than I thought. Some I'd have to think hard to picture.'
